mnemonics.title: Prim's: 'P' for 'Priority Queue'
mnemonics.content: Prim's algorithm uses a Priority queue to pick the next best edge from the current tree.

mnemonics.title: Kruskal's: 'K' for 'Keep sorted and Keep apart'
mnemonics.content: Kruskal's Keeps edges sorted and adds them only if they Keep vertices apart (i.e., don't form a cycle).

mnemonics.title: MST Edge Count
mnemonics.content: For a graph with V vertices, the MST has V-1 edges. Remember: 'Vertices Minus One'.
